questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to Lock Concurrency?
options: Inefficient scaling of Optimistic vs Pessimistic concurrency controls.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of Optimistic vs Pessimistic concurrency controls.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how Optimistic vs Pessimistic concurrency controls scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
